nasb.text: to Abraham for a possession in the presence of the sons of Heth, before all who went in at the gate of his city.

esv.text: to Abraham as a possession in the presence of the Hittites, before all who went in at the gate of his city.

cnv.text: 都在赫人眼前，就是在所有來到城門口的赫人眼前，歸給亞伯拉罕作產業。

ccb.text: 都归了亚伯拉罕。这是在城门口的赫人面前买下的。

csbs.text: 在所有来到城门口的赫提子孙眼前，转给亚伯拉罕作他的财产。
